title: Beyond Disclosure: The Corey Goode Files
original_title: Beyond Disclosure - The Corey Goode Files
overview: After claiming he served 20 years in a secret space program, Corey Goode became a UFO icon - then a lightning rod. This documentary follows his rise and the strange intersection of memory, myth, and media in the age of disclosure.

trailers.title: Beyond Disclosure: The Corey Goode Files - Behind the Scenes James Gilliland
